items.title: Apple will pay $250 million for failing to deliver its AI-powered Siri on time
items.summary: The proposed settlement is the result of a class action lawsuit filed in California.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
items.summary: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1,...

items.title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
items.summary: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.
